title: American Guinea Pig: The Song of Solomon
original_title: American Guinea Pig: The Song of Solomon
overview: A young woman, after driving her father to suicide, is examined by the Catholic Church, who determine that the girl is in fact possessed, and a wave of priests wade in and out of the demonic gore.
